---
title: "Jane Bramston"
---

## Jane Bramston

**Dates:** (1849-1913)

**Maiden name:** (Ady)

### Description

wife of the Rev. John Trant Bramston

### Biography

Jane Ady was the sister-in-law of Mary Eliza Bramston and Anna Rachel Bramston;  her husband was a master at Winchester College.  She was born in Essex, where her father, the Rev. William B. Ady, was Rector of Little Baddow.

### Letters

- Letter from March 27th 1882
- Letter from July 31st 1875
- Letter from May 22nd [1874-7?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
